Options for IMPT optimization.

Constructors

OptimizationOptionsIMPT(int, OptimizationOption)

Constructor for setting proton optimization options. Initial state defines whether proton optimization uses an existing scan list or starts from zero. The optimization continues until convergence or until a maximum number of iterations is reached. Intermediate dose is not used in the optimization.

public OptimizationOptionsIMPT(int maxIterations, OptimizationOption initialState)

Parameters

maxIterations int

Maximum number of iterations for optimization.

initialState OptimizationOption

Initial state at the beginning of optimization.

OptimizationOptionsIMPT(int, OptimizationOption, IonOptimizationIntermediateDoseOption, int)

Constructor for setting proton optimization options for optimizing with intermediate dose. Initial state defines whether proton optimization uses an existing scan list or starts from zero. Intermediate dose option defines whether optimizer gets to converge before intermediate dose calculation or whether it runs for a user-specified number of iterations. Also having multiple intermediate dose calculation rounds or using existing field dose as intermediate dose is possible. Regardless of the intermediate dose option, the final optimization round runs until convergence or until a maximum number of iterations is reached.

public OptimizationOptionsIMPT(int maxIterations, OptimizationOption initialState, IonOptimizationIntermediateDoseOption intermediateDoseOption, int numberOfIterationsBeforeIDose = 0)

Parameters

maxIterations int

Maximum number of iterations for optimization.

initialState OptimizationOption

Initial state at the beginning of optimization.

intermediateDoseOption IonOptimizationIntermediateDoseOption

Used option for calculating and applying intermediate dose.

numberOfIterationsBeforeIDose int

Number of steps before the intermediate dose is calculated.

Properties

ConvergenceOption

Terminate the optimization early if it is converged.

public OptimizationConvergenceOption ConvergenceOption { get; }

Property Value

OptimizationConvergenceOption

IntermediateDoseOption

Use of intermediate dose in proton optimization.

public IonOptimizationIntermediateDoseOption IntermediateDoseOption { get; }

Property Value

IonOptimizationIntermediateDoseOption

MaximumNumberOfIterations

Maximum number of iterations for the IMPT optimizer.

public int MaximumNumberOfIterations { get; }

Property Value

int

NumberOfIterationsBeforeIDose

Number of iterations before the intermediate dose is calculated.

public int NumberOfIterationsBeforeIDose { get; }

int
